title: Guidelines on Telecommunications Sector Cybersecurity Controls
summary: Recommends cybersecurity controls relevant to connected-device infrastructure, including secure by design, secure by default, privacy by design, security risk assessment, data protection assessment, and privacy assessment for technology and telecommunications infrastructure projects.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Non-binding cybersecurity controls for telecommunications entities.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Non-binding cybersecurity control guidelines for the telecommunications sector.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: Cybersecurity control guidance for telecommunications entities.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Telecom cybersecurity guidelines covering incident management.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law, Critical Telecommunications Infrastructure Risk Management Regulation, Position Paper on the Internet of Things
